name: Zucchini Wheat Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the shredded zucchini, water, vegetable oil, honey, salt, and grated orange peel for the small loaf.
2. Mix all ingredients together in a bowl until well combined.
3. Add wheat germ to the mixture.
4. Combine whole wheat flour and bread flour with yeast (for large loaf only) and mix thoroughly.
5. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet ingredients, stirring until just combined.
6. Pour the batter into a greased bread pan.
7. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for about 30-35 minutes or until golden brown.
8. Allow the bread to cool before slicing and serving.
